title: OriginManiac
description: Another Origin Mod Made By DarkChariz
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f70ab24e8effa4e51268e538c10006efe21d642.png)
### Note 

- The MOD Is Functional And Working Fine.
- Some Origin's Are Bound To Bug Out As The MOD Is Still WIP.
- Please Don't Claim As Your Own And Repost.
- Please Ask On Discord Before Using In Public MOD Pack. Also Modded Publishing Is Also Not Allowed.
- You Are Free To Use And Mod For Private Use Privately. 



The Origins Mod is a revolutionary addition to Minecraft that introduces a rich layer of character-driven gameplay. In this mod, players are presented with a diverse array of origins, each imbuing their avatar with unique abilities, strengths, and weaknesses, fundamentally altering the way they interact with the game world.
## 

### Origin's

1 **Ghast:**

Can Shoot Fireballs and Fly Through The World, The Are One Of The Few Origin's With More Health.



2 **Warden:**

Can Do A Sonic Boom Attack and Is One Of The Strongest Origins. As, They Can Attack Stronger And Have Resistence.



3 **_And More!!_**
